name: com.openswissdata/mcp
title: OpenSwissData
description: Lookup Swiss customs tariffs (TARES), FINMA-supervised entities, and NOGA/NACE/ISIC industry codes from any MCP client. 9 tools, non-official mirror of Swiss federal open data.

environmentVariables.name: OPENSWISSDATA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Bearer token for higher quotas / Pro tools. Anonymous tier works without it (~100 req/day/IP).

environmentVariables.name: OPENSWISSDATA_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the remote MCP endpoint (default: https://mcp.openswissdata.com). Useful for staging or self-hosting.
